content.text:
Contoso offers the "Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses." These are categorized as Smart Eyewear and feature:

- An Augmented Reality interface
- Voice-controlled AI agent
- HD video recording with 3D audio
- UV protection and blue light filtering
- Wireless charging with extended battery life

They come with a two-year limited warranty on electronic components and a 30-day return policy with no questions asked.
